---
name: Data Issue
about: A data point is wrong, missing, or from an unacceptable source
title: "[DATA] "
labels: data
assignees: Olayiwolaaa
---

## What is the issue?

- [ ] Incorrect value
- [ ] Missing data for a period
- [ ] Bad or unverifiable source
- [ ] Disputed between two credible sources
- [ ] Other

## Affected Data

- **Indicator:** (e.g. USD/NGN Official Exchange Rate)
- **Time period affected:** (e.g. March 2017 – June 2017)
- **Current value in the database:** (if applicable)

## What the correct value should be

State the correct value or range, and explain how you know.

## Source

- **Source name:**
- **URL:**
- **Archive URL:** (if available — archive at [web.archive.org](https://web.archive.org/) if the link may rot)
- **Publication date:**
- **Table / figure reference:**

## Additional Context

Any anomalies, edge cases, or context that reviewers should know about.
